title: dev-platform telemetry event v1
description: One JSON object per line in ~/.claude/dev-platform-telemetry.log. Emitted by hook scripts in dev/hooks/ and by scripts/gate_fast.sh. Consumed by monitoring/aggregator.py.

v.description: Schema version. Increment when fields change incompatibly; aggregator handles all known versions.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp with timezone, seconds precision.

event.description: Event type. session_start fires once per Claude Code session; user_prompt fires per slash-command invocation; tool_use_start/end pair via tool_call_id; gate_run fires per scripts/gate_fast.sh invocation.

session_id.description: Claude Code session ID. 'gate' for gate_run events (no session context). '?' if upstream payload lacks the field.

project.description: Derived from cwd at hook fire time: 'dev-platform' if cwd is /home/rich/dev or subdir; <name> if cwd is /home/rich/dev/projects/<name>/...; 'other' otherwise.

cwd.description: Working directory at hook fire time. Emitted by session_start only.

tool.description: Tool name (Bash, Read, Edit, ...). Emitted by tool_use_start and tool_use_end.

tool_call_id.description: Pairs tool_use_start with tool_use_end so the aggregator can compute duration_ms. Sourced from Claude Code's tool_use_id.

duration_ms.description: Tool-call duration in milliseconds. Computed by the aggregator from start/end pair; never written by the hook directly.

command.description: Slash command name including leading slash (e.g. '/code'). Emitted by user_prompt only.

args.description: Slash command argument text. Emitted by user_prompt only.

outcome.description: Gate run outcome. Emitted by gate_run only.

pass_count.description: Number of PASS results in the gate run. Emitted by gate_run only.

fail_count.description: Number of FAIL results in the gate run. Emitted by gate_run only.

duration_s.description: Gate run duration in whole seconds. Emitted by gate_run only.
